text:
(In reply to Edward Tomasz Napierala from comment #4)

Logged in then and now, I still don't see it, not even after using the Home button to step away from <https://reviews.freebsd.org/>. 

Please, can you share a screenshot of the relevant portion of the screen? Ideally, including the URL. Thanks.
